# peri_jerseys_israel — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A sports apparel store specializing in football and basketball uniforms, as well as basketball shorts. The store focuses on team sports clothing and athletic wear for players and sports enthusiasts.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About peri_jerseys_israel
A sports apparel store specializing in football and basketball uniforms, as well as basketball shorts. The store focuses on team sports clothing and athletic wear for players and sports enthusiasts.

## Services/Products
- מדי כדורגל
- מדי כדורסל
- מכנסיי כדורסל

## Target Audience
- אוהדי כדורגל
- אוהדי כדורסל
- מדי ספורט

## Industry
Sports Retail
